mapper.select:
SELECT count(DISTINCT RES.`ID_`) FROM ACT_RU_TASK RES LEFT JOIN ACT_RU_IDENTITYLINK I ON I.TASK_ID_ = RES.ID_ LEFT JOIN `act_id_group` g ON g.`ID_` = i.`GROUP_ID_` AND i.`TYPE_` = 'candidate' LEFT JOIN `act_id_membership` im ON im.`GROUP_ID_` = g.`ID_` INNER JOIN ACT_RE_PROCDEF D ON RES.PROC_DEF_ID_ = D.ID_ INNER JOIN `pm_workflow` pw ON pw.`procInstId` = RES.`PROC_INST_ID_` left join `act_id_user` u ON u.`ID_` = res.`ASSIGNEE_`
LEFT JOIN ACT_RU_VARIABLE A0 ON RES.ID_ = A0.TASK_ID_ AND A0.NAME_ = 'startTime' AND A0.TYPE_ = 'date'
LEFT JOIN ACT_RU_VARIABLE A1 ON RES.ID_ = A1.TASK_ID_ AND A1.NAME_ = 'areaPower' AND A1.TYPE_ = 'string'
WHERE FIND_IN_SET( D.KEY_, #{model.processKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND A0.NAME_ = 'startTime' AND A0.TYPE_ = 'date' AND A0.LONG_ <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP(#{model.beginTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) * 1000
AND A1.NAME_ = 'areaPower' AND A1.TYPE_ = 'string' AND FIND_IN_SET(A1.TEXT_, #{model.areaPower})
AND RES.SUSPENSION_STATE_ = 1 AND ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL AND I.TYPE_ = 'candidate' AND ( I.USER_ID_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR im.`USER_ID_` = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) ) AND ( FIND_IN_SET( RES.TASK_DEF_KEY_, #{model.taskKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) )
AND ( u.LAST_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.FIRST_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or g.NAME_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select DISTINCT RES.TASK_DEF_KEY_ as taskKey, res.`NAME_` as taskName, res.`DESCRIPTION_` as taskDesc, RES.`ID_` AS taskId, RES.`CREATE_TIME_` as beginTime, RES.`DUE_DATE_` AS dueTime, pw.*, RES.`ASSIGNEE_` AS assignee, IF ( RES.`ASSIGNEE_` IS NOT NULL AND RES.`ASSIGNEE_` != '', CONCAT(u.`LAST_`, "-", u.`FIRST_`), g.NAME_ ) AS assigneeName, RES.`FORM_KEY_` AS formUrl FROM ACT_RU_TASK RES LEFT JOIN ACT_RU_IDENTITYLINK I ON I.TASK_ID_ = RES.ID_ LEFT JOIN `act_id_group` g ON g.`ID_` = i.`GROUP_ID_` AND i.`TYPE_` = 'candidate' LEFT JOIN `act_id_membership` im ON im.`GROUP_ID_` = g.`ID_` INNER JOIN ACT_RE_PROCDEF D ON RES.PROC_DEF_ID_ = D.ID_ INNER JOIN `pm_workflow` pw ON pw.`procInstId` = RES.`PROC_INST_ID_` left join `act_id_user` u ON u.`ID_` = res.`ASSIGNEE_`
left JOIN ACT_RU_VARIABLE A0 ON RES.ID_ = A0.TASK_ID_ AND A0.NAME_ = 'startTime' AND A0.TYPE_ = 'date'
left JOIN ACT_RU_VARIABLE A1 ON RES.ID_ = A1.TASK_ID_ AND A1.NAME_ = 'areaPower' AND A1.TYPE_ = 'string'
WHERE FIND_IN_SET( D.KEY_, #{model.processKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND A0.NAME_ = 'startTime' AND A0.TYPE_ = 'date' AND A0.LONG_ <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP(#{model.beginTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) * 1000
AND A1.NAME_ = 'areaPower' AND A1.TYPE_ = 'string' AND FIND_IN_SET(A1.TEXT_, #{model.areaPower})
AND RES.SUSPENSION_STATE_ = 1 AND ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL AND I.TYPE_ = 'candidate' AND ( I.USER_ID_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR im.`USER_ID_` = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) ) AND ( FIND_IN_SET( RES.TASK_DEF_KEY_, #{model.taskKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) )
AND ( u.LAST_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.FIRST_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or g.NAME_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
ORDER BY ${orderBy}
ORDER BY pw.`objType`, pw.`objId`, pw.`dataType`, pw.`dataId`
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

SELECT count(DISTINCT RES.ID_) FROM ACT_HI_TASKINST RES INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MAX(CAST(RES.ID_ AS UNSIGNED)) AS maxID, pw.`objType`, pw.`objId`, pw.`dataType`, pw.`dataId` FROM ACT_HI_TASKINST RES LEFT JOIN ACT_HI_IDENTITYLINK i ON i.TASK_ID_ = RES.ID_ LEFT JOIN act_id_group g ON g.`ID_` = i.`GROUP_ID_` AND i.`TYPE_` = 'candidate' LEFT JOIN `act_id_membership` im ON im.`GROUP_ID_` = g.`ID_` INNER JOIN pm_workflow pw ON pw.`procInstId` = RES.`PROC_INST_ID_` WHERE RES.END_TIME_ IS NOT NULL AND ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL AND I.TYPE_ = 'candidate' AND ( I.USER_ID_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR im.`USER_ID_` = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) ) GROUP BY pw.`objType`, pw.`objId`, pw.`dataType`, pw.`dataId`) t ON RES.`ID_` = t.maxID INNER JOIN `pm_workflow` pw ON pw.`procInstId` = RES.`PROC_INST_ID_` LEFT JOIN ACT_HI_IDENTITYLINK I ON I.TASK_ID_ = RES.ID_ LEFT JOIN `act_id_group` g ON g.`ID_` = i.`GROUP_ID_` AND i.`TYPE_` = 'candidate' LEFT JOIN `act_id_membership` im ON im.`GROUP_ID_` = g.`ID_` LEFT JOIN `act_id_user` u ON u.`ID_` = res.`ASSIGNEE_`
LEFT JOIN act_hi_varinst A1 ON RES.ID_ = A1.TASK_ID_ AND A1.NAME_ = 'areaPower' AND A1.VAR_TYPE_ = 'string'
WHERE RES.END_TIME_ IS NOT NULL
AND A1.NAME_ = 'areaPower' AND A1.VAR_TYPE_ = 'string' AND FIND_IN_SET(A1.TEXT_, #{model.areaPower})
AND ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL AND I.TYPE_ = 'candidate' AND ( I.USER_ID_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR im.`USER_ID_` = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) )
AND ( u.LAST_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.FIRST_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or g.NAME_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

SELECT DISTINCT RES.TASK_DEF_KEY_ AS taskKey, res.`NAME_` as taskName, res.`DESCRIPTION_` as taskDesc, RES.`ID_` AS taskId, RES.`PROC_INST_ID_` AS procInstId, RES.`ASSIGNEE_` AS assignee, IF ( RES.`ASSIGNEE_` IS NOT NULL AND RES.`ASSIGNEE_` != '', CONCAT(u.`LAST_`, "-", u.`FIRST_`), g.NAME_ ) AS assigneeName, RES.`FORM_KEY_` AS formUrl, RES.`START_TIME_` as beginTime, res.`END_TIME_` AS endTime, RES.`DUE_DATE_` AS dueTime, pw.* FROM ACT_HI_TASKINST RES INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MAX(CAST(RES.ID_ AS UNSIGNED)) AS maxID, pw.`objType`, pw.`objId`, pw.`dataType`, pw.`dataId` FROM ACT_HI_TASKINST RES LEFT JOIN ACT_HI_IDENTITYLINK i ON i.TASK_ID_ = RES.ID_ LEFT JOIN act_id_group g ON g.`ID_` = i.`GROUP_ID_` AND i.`TYPE_` = 'candidate' LEFT JOIN `act_id_membership` im ON im.`GROUP_ID_` = g.`ID_` INNER JOIN pm_workflow pw ON pw.`procInstId` = RES.`PROC_INST_ID_` WHERE RES.END_TIME_ IS NOT NULL AND ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL AND I.TYPE_ = 'candidate' AND ( I.USER_ID_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR im.`USER_ID_` = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) ) GROUP BY pw.`objType`, pw.`objId`, pw.`dataType`, pw.`dataId`) t ON RES.`ID_` = t.maxID INNER JOIN `pm_workflow` pw ON pw.`procInstId` = RES.`PROC_INST_ID_` LEFT JOIN ACT_HI_IDENTITYLINK I ON I.TASK_ID_ = RES.ID_ LEFT JOIN `act_id_group` g ON g.`ID_` = i.`GROUP_ID_` AND i.`TYPE_` = 'candidate' LEFT JOIN `act_id_membership` im ON im.`GROUP_ID_` = g.`ID_` left join `act_id_user` u ON u.`ID_` = res.`ASSIGNEE_`
LEFT JOIN act_hi_varinst A1 ON RES.ID_ = A1.TASK_ID_ AND A1.NAME_ = 'areaPower' AND A1.VAR_TYPE_ = 'string'
WHERE RES.END_TIME_ IS NOT NULL
AND A1.NAME_ = 'areaPower' AND A1.VAR_TYPE_ = 'string' AND FIND_IN_SET(A1.TEXT_, #{model.areaPower})
AND ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR ( RES.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL AND I.TYPE_ = 'candidate' AND ( I.USER_ID_ = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR im.`USER_ID_` = #{model.assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) )
AND ( u.LAST_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.FIRST_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or g.NAME_ like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
ORDER BY ${orderBy}
ORDER BY RES.END_TIME_ DESC
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}
